reason: §14 gap: BR-005 auto-discard has no enforcing workflow (implemented behind default-OFF flag dental_visit_auto_discard, ADR-010) — deferred, not yet a journey-locked flow.
§14 gap (HIGH): check-in partial-failure recovery path (orphan appointment when visit-draft fails) is undefined — needs an error-handling spec before it can be journey-locked.

§14 gap: BR-001 concurrent-visit conflict is enforced server-side (409) but the client recovery UX is undocumented. visit-active-conflict.spec.ts exercises the server side; the full UX flow is deferred.
§14 gap (HIGH): concurrent invoice creation for the same visit can produce two invoices — billing-integrity error path undefined, needs spec.
§14 gap: PMD generation SLA (sync vs async) unspecified — no measurable workflow to lock yet.

§14 RESOLVED (V-DG-002) at the implementation level; tracked here for completeness. GDPR erasure IS covered by WF-088 (data-erasure-admin.spec.ts). Kept on the allowlist as a doc-gap id, not a coverage gap.
§14 gap (HIGH): patient merge (BR-020) — no workflow, no cross-module cascade defined, not implemented. Cannot be journey-locked until built.
§14 RESOLVED (BR-013 markUncollectible implemented 2026-06-04). Covered indirectly by WF-041 (invoice-detail.spec.ts). Kept as a doc-gap id.

Treatment performed→verified (Dentist-Owner) — FSM transition covered by api-ts unit tests (treatment.fsm.property.test.ts); no dedicated e2e/journey anchor.

Invoice overdue job — scheduled background job; no UI/E2E surface to journey-lock.
Appointment cancel (visit survives, BR-004) — inferred op-table row; no dedicated e2e/journey anchor yet (name parses as the Key-Rules cell; id is correct).

Appointment reminder (24h) notification — not implemented per §8 (= WFG-009).
Imaging study list/report (inferred §9) — imaging surfaces are tested but no dedicated WF-087 study-list anchor.
